title: Maximum XOR With an Element From Array
titleCn: 与数组中元素的最大异或值

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,2,3,4], queries = [[3,1],[1,3],[5,6]] Output: [3,3,7] Explanation: 1) 0 and 1 are the only two integers not greater than 1. 0 XOR 3 = 3 and 1 XOR 3 = 2. The larger of the two is 3. 2) 1 XOR 2 = 3. 3) 5 XOR 2 = 7.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,3,7] Explanation: 1) 0 and 1 are the only two integers not greater than 1. 0 XOR 3 = 3 and 1 XOR 3 = 2. The larger of the two is 3. 2) 1 XOR 2 = 3. 3) 5 XOR 2 = 7.
